=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
BOB DYLAN
West Palm Beach, Florida
SunFest 2003
Washington Mutual Stage
2003 May 04


Unknown rec. Great sound


CD1

1 intro + Maggie's Farm (Bob on piano), 2 Senor (Tales Of Yankee Power) (Bob on piano), 3 Stuck Inside Of Mobile With The Memphis Blues Again (Bob on piano), 4 Lay, Lady, Lay (Bob on piano, Larry on acoustic guitar), 5 Things Have Changed (Bob on piano), 6 Drifter's Escape (Bob on electric guitar and harp), 7 It Ain't Me, Babe (acoustic) (Bob on acoustic guitar), 8 Cold Irons Bound (Bob on electric guitar),

CD2

1 Just Like A Woman (Bob on electric guitar, Larry on pedal steel), 2 Love Sick (Bob on electric guitar), 3 You Ain't Goin' Nowhere (Bob on electric guitar, Larry on pedal steel), 4 Honest With Me (Bob on piano and electric guitar, Larry on slide guitar), 5 Bye And Bye (Bob on piano, Tony on standup bass), 6 Band intro, 7 Summer Days (Bob on piano, Tony on standup bass), 8 Like A Rolling Stone (Bob on piano), 9 All Along The Watchtower (Bob on piano) 


Concert # 1513 of The Never-Ending Tour. Concert # 12 of the 2003 US Spring Tour. 2003 concert # 23.
Concert # 12 with the 16th Never-Ending Tour Band: Bob Dylan (vocal, piano), Freddie Koella (guitar), Larry Campbell (guitar, mandolin, pedal steel guitar & electric slide guitar), Tony Garnier (bass), George Recile (drums & percussion).

7 acoustic with the band.
6, 13 Bob Dylan (harmonica).
4, 11 Larry Campbell (pedal steel guitar).
7 Larry Campbell (cittern).
12 Larry Campbell (slide guitar).
